docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-15-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RAGHEED ABDULAMEER IS PRESENT.
